AC: 8
STR: +7 AGI: +3 ENDUR: +10
SV MAGIC: +4
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM

Race: HUM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Crescent Gi

Slot: CHEST
AC: 8
STR: +7 AGI: +3 ENDUR: +10
SV MAGIC: +4
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 30

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Crypt of Dalnir
NPC Name
a kly cohort


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Crypt of Dalnir

Post Comment
weight!
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2002 at 10:17 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592251752768
View User Forum
5 posts
monk ONLY managed to get mine today, its a nice upgrade from the CCS and the weight is now only 0.1!

Siksissk SugarHoofs
Lanys
▲ Page top
RE: weight!
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2002 at 8:24 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774218671
45 posts
I've had one linked to me today, and it is weight of 0.5 ... like that 0.4 is really going to matter though.
▲ Page top
RE: weight!
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2002 at 11:04 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
Well, 0.4 weight is a stack less bandages you can carry without going over-weight (unless you have uber weight-reducing bags); that's pretty much a complete heal you lose from the difference in weight.

Course if you have a friendly mage to summon goodies for you that's not a problem :).
▲ Page top
Beatlords...?
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2002 at 1:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249432270
3 posts
Can someone please verify if these are useable by Beatlords? Almost everything else monk only was given to Beastlords, but I'm not sure if this is the same.
▲ Page top
RE: Beatlords...?
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2002 at 8:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248159931
33 posts
Nope, not beastlord usable as of April 14, 2002. Got me a full set except the Gi today.
▲ Page top
Crescent, why?
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2002 at 4:17 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762733937
20 posts
Unless you are on a pvp server I see no point to the existence of this stuff. By the time you can get to Dalnir to get it, you should already have much better armour than this stuff. Wu armour is better than this. Just my opinion though...

Edited, Thu Jan 31 03:16:27 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Crescent, why?
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2002 at 9:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780463989
37 posts
I don't know about you, but the one extra AC and little extra AGI isn't that good now that this weighs the same as a Wu's Gi, and gives 7 STR...combined with the SvM and AGI, what mid level monk wouldn't want this?

BTW, when my guild raided Dalnir, 1 run through everything, this and a headband dropped...all our monks quit, so we shouted out...there was a monk in the zone (level 32 if I remember correctly) looking to upgrade Wu's with this...too bad everything had repopped, and by the time she got down there it had rotted.

Aerdor Dewcatcher, 30th season druid
Canoen, 20th season warrior
XEV
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 21 2004 at 10:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Your guild had to "RAID" dalnir? My 44 ranger soloes this place. If your guild is that weak i recomend leaving it.
RE: Crescent, why?
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2004 at 9:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
1. That post was two years ago. A 44 Ranger today with a few thousand platinum worth of Bazaar gear is a God compared to the average level 30 from two years ago.

2. At 44 are anything but the nameds in Dalnir not green to you? There's a big difference between a level 25-30 raid where the mobs are blue and above and a level 44 killing greens who can barely damage them.
▲ Page top
Loot
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 4:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764137952
7 posts
I was lvl 30 when I went to dalnirs to get some crescent armor. I was with my lvl 56 mage and lvl 48 enchanter friends. The crescent gi dropped about twice as much as anything else. Pants dropped a little less then gi. We spent three days there and I got the Gi, pants, sleeves, headband, and boots. Prepare to sit there for a long time, cause we were killing klys constantly. Probably killed 500 of them. Got quite a few duplicates though. Maybe it's just my luck...
Hope this helps someone. =)
▲ Page top
Re: Crescent Gear
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 7:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760087363
53 posts
So far this is the most worthwhile looking crescent gear, for the monks at least. =)
▲ Page top
Please not a robe ...
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2001 at 10:36 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Could some one that has one please tell us what it looks like on? I hate getting Breeeze all the time ... please not a Robe !!
▲ Page top
RE: Please not a robe ...
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2001 at 10:06 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591750754345
10 posts
In your inventory it looks like a robe, but when you wear it it looks like the Cured Silk Gi or the Master Wu's Gi.

Taibai Swiftwind
41 Monk
The Tribunal
▲ Page top
I disagree...
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 1:32 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have been there for a while and although anything is possible here is the list as I know it: Cohort drops Gi, Follower drops gloves, Invoker drops legs, Evoker drops shoes, Believer drops headband, and Acolyte drops sleeves. There has been absolutely no variation on this, it's ALWAYS the same.
▲ Page top
Difficulty
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 7:33 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
could a 30 monk, and 47 druid get the cresent armor peices?
▲ Page top
RE: Difficulty
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 1:04 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591752876288
13 posts
yes, i was lvl 35 with a 37 druid and we were able to get me a gi in 2 days and a headband in 2 days, so it is totally possible.
the gi and the boots are the best, mainly boots because boots for monks are often hard to come by, and crescent slippers have great stats.

-Rolan Monje
35 Monk as of 8/23/01
Seventh Hammer
▲ Page top
Gi
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2001 at 2:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754152416
6 posts
Anyone know spawn rate of the Kly Cohor
( spelling ? ) and how often he drops the gi?
Thanks
▲ Page top
RE: Gi
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2001 at 1:32 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Heh...Cohorts are found all over the place, as well as all the other Kly.....the drop rate of any of the crescent is a small percentage. The Gi is the rarest of all the drops. No one kly drops only one kind of crescent. I've gotten several different pieces from the same kind of Kly. Just go to the church on the 3rd floor and camp that....couple hours there and you'll have what you need!

Pedron Bixiebane - Monk of the 40th Circle (Lanys T'Vyl
▲ Page top
RE: Gi
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 8:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750754345
10 posts
Hmm, I'm a 40 Monk and I was wondering. When would you all think I would be able to go down and maybe solo the pool room? Or somewhere on the 2nd or 3rd floor that I could camp? I really need to replace my Cured Silk pieces with Crescent Pieces hehe.

Taibai Swiftwind
Level 40 Monk
The Tribuna
▲ Page top
RE: Gi
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2001 at 3:32 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758554395
180 posts
should have no problem setting up a camp in pool at 40 and fighting singles. On 3rd, if you can get psat th room full of kly to get out, without getting nuked to death, you can prob do that too in bbq room fighting pops or crusader room.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 02 2001 at 7:56 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I was in Dalnir for three hrs yesterday, and 2 Gi's dropped along with 2 sets of armbands.
